name: Myrtho L.
description: I am pleased with the work. He was professional.

name: Christi M.
description: Chris was very professional. He had great communication and did a great job on our carpets! I would 100% recommend this company!

name: William M.
description: They were friendly and helpful.

name: George M.
description: They did a complete cleaning of our entire residence. Great steam cleaning of the carpets. Our decades-old oven looks brand new. Terrific job on showers and sinks. I was pleasantly surprised by the price.

name: John M.
description: I needed carpet cleaned. The work was done and I will recommend the company to everyone I know. They are the best company. I'm very pleased with them.

name: Megan T.
description: Chris from All The Rage Carpet Cleaning cleaned the carpets in my apartment prior to move in. He was very professional and the carpets look great! I would 100% recommend him to anyone.

name: Jannette B.
description: I have a 29 foot fifth wheel and they cleaned all the carpet and any fabric inside of it.

name: Heather L.
description: Quick and professional! They got me booked within one day and did a fantastic job. Would definitely recommend!

name: Denise C.
description: Exactly what I needed. Efficient, thorough, easy to work with. Quick replies.

name: Glenda K.
description: AWESOME!!!!!

name: Jenny R.
description: They were on time, professional, and did a fantastic job for a reasonable price. I will use them for all my floor needs.

name: Matt K.
description: The technicians Chris and Lee were wonderful! Punctual, professional, and above all great at their job! Removed stubborn stains in the hallway and left the whole house smelling great!! Would definitely recommend to anyone who needs carpet cleaning or upholstery cleaning!! Looking forward to our next cleaning already!

name: Vivian H.
description: Excellent job! Will definitely use again. They were prompt and courteous and removed stains the previous company I used was unable to. Extremely satisfied with the price and the results.

name: Dale P.
description: Great. Chris is awesome. Did a great job. Was on time and very friendly. Would hire him again and would recommend 100 fold.

name: Kayla J.
description: Very professional, outstanding outcome.

name: Ron S.
description: Perfect and timely.

name: Jennifer L.
description: I recently hired All The Rage Carpet Cleaning for both carpet and house cleaning, and I am extremely pleased with the results. Their service was not only fast and professional but also showcased a remarkable attention to detail. I highly recommend them for anyone in need of thorough and efficient cleaning services. Five stars!

name: Sissy B.
description: These guys are the most professional I have ever encountered. Not only were they thorough, but their attention to detail is extremely rare to find these days. I highly recommend this company and will always be a client.

name: Nate C.
description: It was wonderful. I will definitely hire them again.

name: Ricky T.
description: Excellent service. Cleaned my area rugs and made them look new again. Will definitely use them again.

name: Erika P.
description: Arrived on time. I feel they went out of their way to please me. My carpet was brought back to life and even my sofa after they cleaned it. I've used Lee several times over the past 3–4 years. 5 star service!
